message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ActorBorderColor black
  ActorFontSize 28
  ParticipantFontSize 28
  LifeLineBorderColor black
  LifeLineBackgroundColor white
  ParticipantBorderColor black
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
  ArrowColor black
  ArrowThickness 2
  MessageFontSize 28
  ActivationBorderColor black
  ActivationBackgroundColor white
}

actor Admin as A
participant ":System" as S

A -> S : Requests the vehicle maximum payload
S --> A : Asks for the vehicle ID
A -> S : Fills the information
S --> A : Validates and presents the vehicle maximum payload.

@enduml
